# Dynamic conditions (field access) do not trigger dead-branch warnings.

check-templates -w ./...
! stderr 'W006'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"fmt"
	"html/template"
	"net/http"
)

var (
	//go:embed *.gohtml
	source embed.FS

	templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(source, "*"))
)

type Page struct {
	Title  string
	Active bool
}

func handleIndex(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = templates.ExecuteTemplate(w, "index.gohtml", Page{Title: "Home", Active: true})
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint

-- index.gohtml --
{{if .Active}}<h1>{{.Title}}</h1>{{else}}<h1>inactive</h1>{{end}}
